title: anisotome aromatica var. lanuginosa
intro: Anisotome aromatica var. lanuginosa, also known as woolly aniseed myrtle or aniseed myrtle, is a plant species native to New Zealand, characterized by its distinctive aniseed or licorice-like scent and flavor. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits of Anisotome aromatica var. lanuginosa include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies for various health issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote digestive health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
